---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the behavior you want.

## Alternatives Considered

Other options you evaluated.

## Scope

- Affected area: (`core` / `cli` / `desktop-tauri` / `webpanel`)
- Breaking change: (`yes` / `no`)

## Performance / Privacy Impact

If relevant, explain expected impact on:
- latency / throughput
- CPU / RAM usage
- privacy / offline behavior

## Additional Context

Mockups, links, examples, or notes.
